# Kelowna Protech Elite Mobile Mechanic

> Mobile mechanic service in Kelowna, BC, Canada. A certified mechanical engineer comes to your vehicle — no tow truck, no shop drop-off, same-day diagnosis and repair in most cases.

## Who We Are

Kelowna Protech Elite Mobile Mechanic is owned and operated by Joseph, a mechanical engineer with 15+ years of experience, including management roles at John Deere Nelson Motors, Vegpro International, and Lake Country Shop. Joseph is supported by Maricela, Director & Co-Founder, who manages operations and client coordination.

We are not a shop. We go to the client — at their home, workplace, or roadside — diagnose the problem on-site, source parts, and complete the repair the same day in most cases. No tow truck. No waiting days for a shop slot.

Rated 4.9 stars on Google with 45 verified reviews. #1 mobile mechanic on Google Maps in Kelowna, BC.

## Services

- On-site vehicle diagnostics (PCM-based, electrical diagrams, systematic troubleshooting)
- Engine and drivetrain repair
- Electrical system diagnosis and repair
- Pre-purchase vehicle inspections
- Commercial fleet inspections
- Battery, starter, and alternator service
- Cooling system repair
- Brake service
- Same-day repair for most common failures

Vehicles served: 2010 and newer. All makes and models including European vehicles.

## Service Area

Kelowna, BC and surrounding areas including West Kelowna, Lake Country, and the Okanagan Valley.

## Pricing

- Diagnostic: $250 + GST (includes $150 diagnostic labour + $100 mobile dispatch fee)
- Repairs: $500+ depending on job scope
- The diagnostic fee is charged once per visit, regardless of how many issues are found.

Pricing is transparent and itemized. No hidden fees.

## Contact

- Phone / SMS: (250) 859-5467 — SMS preferred for fastest response
- Website: https://kelownaprotechmobilemech.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8am–6pm Pacific Time

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://kelownaprotechmobilemech.com/
- Our Story: https://kelownaprotechmobilemech.com/our-story/
- Field Reports (repair case studies): https://kelownaprotechmobilemech.com/field-reports/
- Google Reviews: https://share.google/nIHmMOjqsRskkHvpM

## Why Clients Choose Us

Clients pay for certainty, speed, and convenience — not the cheapest price. A mobile diagnosis eliminates the cost and hassle of towing, and catches problems before they become more expensive. Most clients are back on the road the same day.

Common client profile: Kelowna resident whose vehicle won't start or has a warning light, who needs the problem resolved without disrupting their day.
